description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure kneeling or sitting, with its head bowed and arms resting on its lap. The figure is draped in flowing garments, with detailed folds and creases visible in the fabric. The sculpture appears to be carved from a single block of stone or cast in a similar material, with a solid rectangular base supporting the figure. The head is rounded and featureless, suggesting either abstraction or weathering. The back of the sculpture shows the continuation of the robe, with a flat, textured surface forming the base. The overall form is compact and monolithic, with a sense of solemnity and contemplation.
description: A stone sculpture of a kneeling or seated robed human figure with a bowed head, resting on a rectangular base. The figure is detailed with flowing garments and a smooth, featureless head.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the rounded, featureless head and the draped arms resting on the lap, with the rectangular base visible beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bent posture, detailed folds of the robe, and the rectangular base supporting the figure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the flat, textured back of the base and the back of the robe, with less detail on the figure's features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the length of the robe, the figure's back, and the solid base, emphasizing the sculpture's monolithic form.
attribute_subject_matter: kneeling or seated human figure in a robe
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background and surroundings are not shown in the images.
